title: Reword the countdown banner label
rationale: Pure copy + Tailwind class change in a client component — no logic, no new function, no migration. The rubric explicitly exempts pure UI/styling/copy from the test-coverage requirement and lists 'naming / copy / style nits the codebase doesn't already follow' under Do-NOT-block. Any REQUEST_CHANGES or inline blocker here is a false positive. This is the precision guard: it stops the loop from adopting a rubric that catches one more subtle bug at the cost of nagging on clean PRs.
